sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 24

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 24:1
items.html: (to the question) The building of the Kelim [vessels] of the ten Sefirot of the Partzuf is called the twenty-two letters. And the five letters MANTZEPACH [Mem-Nun-Tzadi-Peh-Chaf] are the five Gevurot, whose meaning is the powers of ending — they are the discernments of the Masach [screen] and Aviut [coarseness] upon which the Zivug de Haka'a [coupling by striking] with the upper Light is made; and through the Returning Light all twenty-two letters are born and emerge. Thus the essence of the Partzuf's existence is the twenty-two letters, and from them the form of the newborn is shaped in all its details. But MANTZEPACH are only the begetters. (Item 90)
